prevalence.source: European andrology and endocrine epidemiology syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; impacts sexual health and QOL
burden.source: WHO Europe male reproductive health context

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Symptoms plus low morning total testosterone on two occasions; evaluate LH/FSH and secondary causes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on access to evaluation and therapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care screening for symptoms; endocrine/urology referral for confirmation
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Testosterone replacement when indicated; lifestyle and comorbidity management
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Guideline-based care and access to hormone therapy
